name: cloudflare-extended
description: Full Cloudflare management — DNS records, Tunnels, zones, and cache purging via the Cloudflare REST API

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.description: Your Cloudflare API token — create one at https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens with Zone and DNS permissions

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Your Cloudflare Account ID — found on the right sidebar of your Cloudflare dashboard homepage
